fixture_rows.expected_result: After a successful finalizeWithdrawalTransaction call, l2Sender is default.
fixture_rows.reason: Covers the normal success path after l2Sender is set and reset around SafeCall.callWithMinGas.

fixture_rows.expected_result: After a target-call failure that does not revert the outer transaction, l2Sender is default.
fixture_rows.reason: Covers success=false finalization and WithdrawalFinalized(false) after l2Sender reset.

fixture_rows.expected_result: After the expected OptimismPortal_GasEstimation revert, persisted l2Sender remains default.
fixture_rows.reason: The function resets l2Sender before the gas-estimation revert branch, but the revert rolls back the call frame; this fixture documents the expected persisted post-state.

fixture_rows.expected_result: After SafeCall insufficient-gas revert, persisted l2Sender remains default.
fixture_rows.reason: The revert occurs during SafeCall.callWithMinGas before the explicit reset line executes, so the assertion verifies full call-frame rollback.

fixture_rows.expected_result: After the nested call reverts and the outer finalization completes, l2Sender is default.
fixture_rows.reason: Directly exercises the l2Sender reentrancy guard while still verifying the outer call returns to default state.

fixture_rows.case: external-proof finalization by secondary proof submitter
fixture_rows.expected_result: After finalizeWithdrawalTransactionExternalProof succeeds for a secondary proof submitter, l2Sender is default.
fixture_rows.reason: Covers the public external-proof entrypoint that delegates into the same guard/reset code path.

next_action: Only after explicit approval, materialize a local patch file and run local upstream tests; do not submit or test live targets.

patch_design.apply_strategy: Add one explicit post-state assertion to each existing upstream fixture at the listed insertion point. Do not change production code unless an approved local test run reveals a real failing invariant.

source_snapshots.name: OptimismPortal2.sol
source_snapshots.observation: The source checks l2Sender against Constants.DEFAULT_L2_SENDER as a reentrancy guard, sets l2Sender to the withdrawal sender before SafeCall.callWithMinGas, resets l2Sender to the default immediately after the target call returns, and then may revert for gas-estimation failure.

source_snapshots.name: OptimismPortal2.t.sol
source_snapshots.observation: The upstream test file already covers the main finalization paths but does not explicitly assert the l2Sender postcondition after each relevant path.
